channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Stocks and bonds slump in tandem as Iran shock leaves investors ‘nowhere to hide’
item.description: <![CDATA[Stocks and bonds slump in tandem as Iran shock leaves investors ‘nowhere to hide’]]>

item.title: More than half of the S&P 500 industry sectors are in correction territory. How much longer until the index itself succumbs?
item.description: <![CDATA[More than half of the S&P 500 industry sectors are in correction territory. How much longer until the index itself succumbs?]]>

item.title: Google nears deal to help finance multibillion-dollar data centre leased to Anthropic
item.description: <![CDATA[Google nears deal to help finance multibillion-dollar data centre leased to Anthropic]]>

item.title: KPMG to cut almost 600 UK jobs as slowdown persists
item.description: <![CDATA[KPMG to cut almost 600 UK jobs as slowdown persists]]>

item.title: US seeks to scrap offshore wind projects in exchange for fossil fuel deals
item.description: <![CDATA[US seeks to scrap offshore wind projects in exchange for fossil fuel deals]]>
